articles.title: US Inflation Accelerates, Though Core Gauge Comes in Softer
articles.summary: US inflation accelerated in May to the fastest pace in more than three years as the Iran war pushed up energy prices, outstripping Americans’ pay gains.

articles.title: Stocks Pare Losses After Tame Inflation Report: Markets Wrap
articles.summary: A relatively tame inflation report brought a degree of relief to Wall Street, with stocks paring losses on hopes that Federal Reserve officials will hold off on raising interest rates.

articles.title: US Inflation Accelerates in May, While Core CPI Softens

articles.title: Argentine Peso Drops Most Over Eight Weeks Since Midterm Selloff
articles.summary: An incipient decline in the Argentine peso is gaining momentum, as investors grow more risk averse and policymakers in Buenos Aires loosen their grip on the volatile currency.

articles.title: CIBC to Offer SpaceX Access Through Canadian Depositary Receipt

articles.title: DCC Inclined to Accept New £5.7 Billion Bid From KKR and ECP
articles.summary: DCC Plc said it was prepared to accept an improved offer from buyout firms KKR & Co. and Energy Capital Partners, which valued the firm at about £5.7 billion ($7.6 billion).
